name: sim-hardware-as-code-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for sim-hardware-as-code: the simulation-in-the-loop, hardware-as-code engineering methodology (design-of-record + scored audits + rerun viz + tradeoff studies + tiered FEA + manufacturability loop + living guardrails).

plugins.name: sim-hardware-as-code
plugins.description: Simulation-in-the-loop, hardware-as-code methodology: design-of-record JSON + scored audits + rerun viz + tradeoff studies + tiered FEA (analytic -> beam -> gmsh+CalculiX continuum) + manufacturability loop + living guardrails.
